steps: Contact Goldman Sachs to request refund of USD 2,025.00 excess payment on GOOGL dividend for account 1901234567
Reference US-UK tax treaty Article 10 specifying 15% withholding rate on dividends for UK residents
Provide calculation showing correct net should be USD 114,750.00 (135,000 gross less 15% treaty rate)
Request formal confirmation of refund processing timeline and method
